mapper.select: SELECT attachment_url FROM lease_attachments WHERE lease_id = #{id}

SELECT l.*, p.name as property_name, p.address as property_address, t.name as tenant_name FROM leases l LEFT JOIN properties p ON l.property_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tenants t ON l.tenant_id = t.id WHERE l.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leases( id, landlord_id, property_id, tenant_id, start_date, end_date, rent, deposit, payment_mode, payment_day, include_property_fee, include_utility, other_terms, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES( #{id}, #{landlordId}, #{propertyId}, #{tenantId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{rent}, #{deposit}, #{paymentMode}, #{paymentDay}, #{includePropertyFee}, #{includeUtility}, #{otherTerms}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE leases SET start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, rent = #{rent}, deposit = #{deposit}, payment_mode = #{paymentMode}, payment_day = #{paymentDay}, include_property_fee = #{includePropertyFee}, include_utility = #{includeUtility}, other_terms = #{otherTerms}, status = #{status}, termination_reason = #{terminationReason}, actual_termination_date = #{actualTerminationDate}, renewed_from = #{renewedFrom}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT l.*, p.name as property_name, p.address as property_address, t.name as tenant_name FROM leases l LEFT JOIN properties p ON l.property_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tenants t ON l.tenant_id = t.id WHERE l.landlord_id = #{landlordId} ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM leases WHERE landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND status = #{status}

SELECT l.*, p.name as property_name, p.address as property_address, t.name as tenant_name FROM leases l LEFT JOIN properties p ON l.property_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tenants t ON l.tenant_id = t.id WHERE l.landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND l.status = '生效中' AND l.end_date <= #{date}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leases WHERE landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND status = #{status}

SELECT l.*, p.name as property_name, p.address as property_address, t.name as tenant_name FROM leases l LEFT JOIN properties p ON l.property_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tenants t ON l.tenant_id = t.id WHERE l.status = '生效中'
